name: facebook-cover-v2-matched
prompt: Design a premium Facebook cover image for Surnex. Use the first attached image only as the visual world/style anchor. Use the second attached image as the only valid Surnex logo mark reference. Create a wide brand-first composition optimized for a Facebook page cover crop. Premium dark cinematic environment, near-black and charcoal base, controlled lime signal-routing energy, modular dark product-inspired surfaces, clean hierarchy, elegant and operator-grade, minimal clutter. Include restrained branding using only the attached Surnex logo mark, rendered in brand lime. If a wordmark is needed, render the word SURNEX in clean white geometric sans lettering without distortion. No extra slogans. No fake UI text. No people. No generic AI wallpaper. Output image only.
